question_text: I feel that I belong at HKUST(GZ).
I feel confident participating in class discussions.
I feel comfortable initiating conversations with students from a different cultural background.
I feel confident in my ability to succeed academically at HKUST(GZ).
I have been excluded from, or had difficulty joining, a study group due to language or cultural differences.
I regularly interact with local Chinese students outside of class.
Language differences make it difficult for me to form meaningful friendships here.
I have meaningful friendships with students from different backgrounds.
Social difficulties on campus have negatively affected my actual grades.
Social difficulties on campus have negatively affected my motivation to study.
Students at HKUST(GZ) tend to stay within their own cultural or national groups.
The university does enough to help international students integrate and succeed.
When working on group projects, I feel my contributions are valued equally.
